title: Copis Homes
description: A Homes Project, It allows you to sethome.
body:
#

Copis Homes

# Features ## Set Homes - Players can save custom homes using `/sethome `. ## Teleport to Homes - Use `/home ` to teleport to a saved home. - Includes 5-second countdown with portal particles and sound effects. - Teleport is cancelled if the player moves. ## Teleport Cooldown - 30-second cooldown between teleports per player to prevent spam. ## Persistent Storage - Home locations are saved in `config/copis_homes.json` and persist across server restarts. - Works on Fabric and compatible plugin servers.
